Maven's Deli

Sun Apr 12 2026 20:00:00 GMT-0400 (Eastern Daylight Time)

Sophie: I know they were annoyed at us. We were laughing up a storm.

Me: We were taking up all the gigglespace.

Oh happy days, one of the happiest nights of my life. Sophie came in the deli wearing an all green outfit impressive because I think she only has 2 green clothes in her closet minus the beersuit. My my roast beef mountain high. Savor that pink meat and sweet apricot glaze: A Wedding Cake of Flavor! Laaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa!!
